summary: Completed comprehensive edge case testing of Peptimancer AI-powered peptide architect. Advanced testing covered input validation edge cases, mobile responsiveness, advanced modification types, and scientific accuracy. GPT-4 integration performing excellently with scientifically plausible results. Found minor backend validation issues for edge cases but core functionality robust.

minor_bugs.issue: Invalid amino acid sequences (e.g., 'INVALID123') return 200 status with empty analogues instead of 400 error
minor_bugs.impact: Frontend receives successful response for invalid input, but analogues array is empty
minor_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 400 Bad Request for invalid sequences

minor_bugs.issue: Empty sequences return 200 status with empty analogues instead of 400 error
minor_bugs.impact: No proper validation error for empty input
minor_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 400 Bad Request for empty sequences

minor_bugs.issue: Sequences with special characters (e.g., 'HAE-GTF@TSD#VSS') are processed instead of rejected
minor_bugs.impact: Invalid characters are processed by AI, potentially causing unexpected results
minor_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 400 Bad Request for sequences with non-amino acid characters

minor_bugs.issue: Empty sequence validation returns 404 instead of handling empty input
minor_bugs.expected_behavior: Should return 200 with is_valid: false for empty sequences

ui_bugs.issue: Button not consistently disabled for empty sequences
ui_bugs.expected_behavior: Should always be disabled when sequence is empty or invalid

passed_tests: Sequence validation for invalid amino acids (X, Z)
Generate analogues with basic parameters (2-3 analogues)
Generate analogues with minimal parameters (1 analogue)
Generate analogues with maximum count (10 analogues)
Advanced lipidation modifications (K, N, C sites)
Very long sequence processing (112+ amino acids)
Edge case sequence validation (numbers, mixed case, very long)
Frontend page loading and UI rendering
Form elements with proper data-testid attributes
Loading state display during AI generation (15+ seconds)
Results display with analogue cards and scientific data
IP risk scoring (0-10 scale) with color coding
Novelty scoring (0-10 scale) with color coding
Form field focus and input handling on mobile
Special character input handling in text fields
Form state management and reset on page reload
GPT-4 AI integration generating scientifically accurate analogues
Advanced peptide chemistry modifications properly applied

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (core functionality excellent, minor button state issue)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix backend validation for edge cases: (1) Return 400 for invalid amino acid sequences instead of 200, (2) Return 400 for empty sequences instead of 200, (3) Return 400 for sequences with special characters, (4) Handle empty sequence validation endpoint. Minor frontend fix: ensure generate button is consistently disabled for invalid input.
